message:
fix(writer): fix memory leaks in ProtobufEncoder cleanup

Changed errdefer to defer in encodeSchema() and encodePage() so
the temporary ProtobufEncoder buffers are freed on success, not
just on error. The buffers were leaking because dupe() copies the
bytes but the originals were never freed.

Fixes 4 memory leaks in test_ingest "CSV to Lance round-trip" test.
